basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 TGT, Ward Boy and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: TGT, Art Master, Laboratory Assistant (Physics), MO, Ward Boy / Matron (Hostel)
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Satara has published the TGT, Art Master, Laboratory Assistant (Physics), Medical Officer, and Ward Boy / Matron (Hostel) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 13 teaching and non-teaching positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 50 years and holding qualifications such as Graduation with 50% marks, B.Ed, CTET/STET Paper II, MBBS, Intermediate Science, or Matriculation are eligible to apply offline at www.sainiksatara.org. The application process will be active till 01 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application form

application_fee.sc_fee: Not required to pay any application fee

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with 50% marks, B.Ed or equivalent, CTET/STET Paper II, MBBS, Matriculation
qualification.details: TGT (Mathematics): Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in Mathematics OR Four years Integrated B.Sc.B.Ed (PCM) of Regional College of Education of NCERT with at least 50% marks AND B.Ed or equivalent with 50% marks AND Passed CTET/STET Paper II. TGT (Hindi): Graduate in Hindi with at least 50% marks AND B.Ed or equivalent AND Passed CTET/STET Paper II. TGT (Social Science): Graduate with two subjects out of History, Political Science, Economics, Sociology, Geography with 50% marks OR Hons Graduation with History/Political Science/Geography AND B.Ed OR B.A.Ed AND Passed CTET/STET Paper II. TGT (Marathi): Graduate in Marathi with 50% marks AND B.Ed or equivalent AND Qualified CTET/State TET Paper II. Art Master: Four years Diploma in Fine Arts after Class XII OR Five years after Class X OR Degree in Fine Arts/Crafts OR B.Ed in Fine Arts from Regional College of Education. Music Teacher: Five years study in Music equivalent to Graduate/Post Graduate OR Bachelor's with Music OR Higher Secondary with Sangeet Visharad etc. Laboratory Assistant (Physics): Intermediate Science or equivalent in Physics with 50% marks. Medical Officer: MBBS degree. Ward Boy / Matron (Hostel): Matriculation or equivalent; able to converse fluently in English.

salary_details.details: TGT (Mathematics): Rs. 40,000/- per month TGT (Hindi): Rs. 40,000/- per month TGT (Social Science): Rs. 40,000/- per month TGT (Marathi): Rs. 40,000/- per month Art Master: Rs. 32,000/- per month Music Teacher: Rs. 27,000/- per month Laboratory Assistant (Physics): Rs. 25,000/- per month Medical Officer: Rs. 30,000/- per month Ward Boy / Matron (Hostel): Rs. 27,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sainiksatara.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026 is 01 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies announced for various posts in Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026. These include TGT, Art Master, Music Teacher, Laboratory Assistant, Medical Officer, and Ward Boy/Matron.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the given address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts in Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026 is between 18 years to 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for TGT posts?
faq.answer: For TGT posts, candidates generally need a Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the relevant subject, along with a B.Ed or equivalent qualification and a passed CTET/STET Paper II.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, SC/ST candidates are not required to pay any application fee for Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026. General and OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 250/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary range for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates ranges from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month, depending on the post they are appointed to.

faq.question: Q8. How will candidates be selected for the posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026 primarily involves an examination. Further details will be provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Satara, which is www.sainiksatara.org.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational certificates along with the application form.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for Sainik School Satara Recruitment 2026 is 01 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.
